title: Egyptian Flatbread
description: A classic Egyptian flatbread recipe made with simple ingredients.
instructions: 1. In a large mixing bowl, combine the flour, yeast, and salt.
2. Gradually add the water to the dry ingredients and mix until a dough forms.
3. Knead the dough for 5-7 minutes until smooth and elastic.
4. Place the dough in a greased bowl, cover it with a damp cloth, and let it rest in a warm place for 1 hour.
5. Preheat a non-stick skillet or griddle over medium heat.
6. Divide the dough into 4-6 equal portions, depending on the desired size of the flatbreads.
7. Roll out each portion into a thin circle, about 6-7 inches in diameter.
8. Brush the tops with olive oil and cook for 1-2 minutes on each side, until lightly browned and puffed.
9. Serve warm or at room temperature, with optional toppings.
